# description

The plain-text annotation entered by the user for this style/component.

Supported on:

*   [ComponentNode](/docs/plugins/api/ComponentNode/)
*   [ComponentSetNode](/docs/plugins/api/ComponentSetNode/)
*   [EffectStyle](/docs/plugins/api/EffectStyle/)
*   [GridStyle](/docs/plugins/api/GridStyle/)
*   [PaintStyle](/docs/plugins/api/PaintStyle/)
*   [TextStyle](/docs/plugins/api/TextStyle/)

## Signature​

### [description](/docs/plugins/api/properties/nodes-description/): string

## Remarks​

To set a rich-text description using markdown, see [`descriptionMarkdown`](/docs/plugins/api/properties/nodes-descriptionmarkdown/)

caution

⚠️ There is a currently a bug in Figma where the description field will appear to be missing or not up to date. Until this is fixed, the workaround is to re-publish nodes for which the description is missing.
